questionHtml: Calculate the average tax rate for an individual who earns $64 000 per year.
markschemeHtml:
12 000 × 5 % + 15 500 × 12 % + 32 500 × 21.5 % + 4 000 × 32 %
= $10 727.50

Working is not required.

average tax rate

( 10 727.5 64 000 ) × 100

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

= 16.76 %

An answer of 16.76 or 0.17 (without working) is sufficient for [1].

meta.title: Calculate the average tax rate for an individual who earns $64 000 per year.
